hero.title: The modern offline toolkit for Windows creators.
hero.description: Resize images, compress videos, extract frames, scan documents, build palettes, and more. Everything runs locally on your PC.

release.title: RFINE v1.0.0
release.dateLabel: Initial website-ready release. Replace this with your real latest version.
release.summary: Set this to your latest release highlight.
release.downloadDescription: Start with the latest Windows build from GitHub Releases. Later we can swap this to a direct asset download URL.
release.downloadCaption: Edit version, link, and notes in data/site.json.

showcase.name: RFINE Dashboard
showcase.summary: A calm launchpad for your offline workflow.

showcase.name: Image Resizer
showcase.summary: Resize and convert images in a clean batch workflow.

showcase.name: Video Compressor
showcase.summary: Reduce video size without making the interface feel heavy.

showcase.name: Frame Extractor
showcase.summary: Pull still frames from video with fast offline processing.

showcase.name: Color Studio
showcase.summary: Explore palettes, gradients, and hex values in one place.

showcase.name: Scan Studio
showcase.summary: Scan, crop, correct perspective, and clean documents offline.

tools.name: Image Resizer
tools.description: Resize, convert, and optimize large image batches with the same calm workflow every time.

tools.name: Video Compressor
tools.description: Shrink file sizes while keeping the process simple and easy to trust.

tools.name: Frame Extractor
tools.description: Capture the exact still you need from any supported video.

tools.name: Watermarker
tools.description: Apply clean marks and protect your work without clutter.

tools.name: Audio Studio
tools.description: Pull audio and convert it into the format your workflow needs.

tools.name: Color Studio
tools.description: Pick colors from images, inspect values, and build gradients you can copy instantly.

tools.name: Scan Studio
tools.description: Detect corners, fix perspective, and export clear multi-page scans offline.

tools.name: Text Case
tools.description: Switch between naming styles and clean text in seconds.

tools.name: Vectorizer
tools.description: Convert simple raster artwork into scalable vectors right on your machine.

features.title: Everything stays local
features.description: RFINE is designed around offline work. Your files stay on your PC, with no uploads and no waiting for cloud processing.

features.title: Built for repeat work
features.description: The interface stays consistent across tools so repeated tasks feel faster, calmer, and easier to trust.

features.title: A growing suite
features.description: The product can grow with tools like Color Studio, Scan Studio, Text Case, and Vectorizer without losing its identity.

items: Laid the first public website foundation for RFINE.
Added editable hero, tool, release, and FAQ content through one JSON file.
Added an auto-rotating hero showcase for screenshots.
Replace placeholder screenshots with real app captures.
Connect release details directly to GitHub API.
Add dedicated tool pages if needed.

faq.question: Is RFINE free?
faq.answer: Yes. This website is set up for a free software workflow, and the download area can point directly to your GitHub Releases page.

faq.question: Does RFINE work offline?
faq.answer: That is the core promise of the product. Keep this answer if every tool runs locally without uploading files.

faq.question: How do I update the site later?
faq.answer: Edit the text, links, and tool list in data/site.json. Replace the screenshots inside assets/screenshots when you have final images.
